signals.headline: Trump Deletes AI-Generated Image of Himself as Christ-Like Figure on Truth Social After Backlash from Supporters** | NO
signals.raw:
Trump Deletes AI-Generated Image of Himself as Christ-Like Figure on Truth Social After Backlash from Supporters** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4]

President Trump posted the controversial AI image on Truth Social on April 13, 2026, showing him in a white robe with divine light healing a man, which he later deleted following outrage, including from Christian supporters accusing him of blasphemy

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's headline CPI inflation rose to 2.16% year-on-year in March 2026, up from 2.00% in February, as reported by official data from Statistics Korea via rateinflation.com[2]. This recent confirmation, showing a 0.34% month-on-month increase, aligns with ING's analysis of steady February inflation
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: **Core Development**: Bloomberg reports the US and Iran are considering fresh talks for a "bigger ceasefire deal" before
signals.raw: **Core Development**: Bloomberg reports the US and Iran are considering fresh talks for a "bigger ceasefire deal" before the current two-week truce ends around April 21, boosting stock markets (S&P erased Iran war losses) and lowering oil prices as hopes rise for de-escalation; this follows failed Islamabad talks on April 12[1][2].

Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?

signals.raw: **Trump's Role**: President Trump initiated a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz to pressure Iran's oil exports, even as talks advance; he noted Iran's diminished military capabilities (air force, anti-aircraft, radar, leaders gone)[1].

signals.headline: **Prediction Market Impact**: Ceasefire extension hopes have driven immediate market moves (stocks up, oil down), signal
signals.raw: **Prediction Market Impact**: Ceasefire extension hopes have driven immediate market moves (stocks up, oil down), signaling potential resolution on escalation/nuclear tensions; confidence medium due to ongoing blockade and recent talk failures[1][2][3].

signals.headline: **Additional Context**: Prior US-Iran talks in Pakistan collapsed without a long-term nuclear deal (US sought 20-year mo
signals.raw: **Additional Context**: Prior US-Iran talks in Pakistan collapsed without a long-term nuclear deal (US sought 20-year moratorium, Iran offered 5-year suspension); new rounds could start end of week; China condemned the blockade[3].
